chapters.narration: Vera's capstone has three phases: design trails with vector addition, place wildlife cameras using linear independence, and read visitor movement in different coordinate systems. From the visitor center at zero-zero to the waterfall at six-eight, with a rest stop at three-four — two segments of length five give a total trail distance of ten units under the L2 norm.

Two camera direction vectors are linearly independent when neither lies along the other — their determinant is non-zero, so together they span the whole plane. The same movement vector reads differently in a custom basis. Switch coordinate systems and the numbers change, but the arrow on the map stays put.
